mapper.select: select id, task_id, action_type, create_by, create_time, other_info_01, other_info_02, other_info_03, other_info_04, other_info_05, other_info_06, other_info_07 from action_log where id = #{id}

select id, task_id, action_type, create_by, create_time, other_info_01, other_info_02, other_info_03, other_info_04, other_info_05, other_info_06, other_info_07 from action_log limit #{offset}, #{limit}
mapper.insert: insert into action_log(task_id, action_type, create_by, create_time, other_info_01, other_info_02, other_info_03, other_info_04, other_info_05, other_info_06, other_info_07) values (#{taskId}, #{actionType}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{otherInfo01}, #{otherInfo02}, #{otherInfo03}, #{otherInfo04}, #{otherInfo05}, #{otherInfo06}, #{otherInfo07})
mapper.update:
update action_log
task_id = #{taskId},
action_type = #{actionType},
create_by = #{createBy},
create_time = #{createTime},
other_info_01 = #{otherInfo01},
other_info_02 = #{otherInfo02},
other_info_03 = #{otherInfo03},
other_info_04 = #{otherInfo04},
other_info_05 = #{otherInfo05},
other_info_06 = #{otherInfo06},
other_info_07 = #{otherInfo07},
where id = #{id}
